mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ar.code, ar.name, ar.description, ar.status, ar.built_in FROM admin_role ar JOIN admin_user_role aur ON aur.role_id = ar.id WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} AND ar.status = 1 ORDER BY ar.id

SELECT DISTINCT ap.id, ap.code, ap.name, ap.category, ap.permission_type, ap.status FROM admin_permission ap JOIN admin_role_permission arp ON arp.permission_id = ap.id JOIN admin_role ar ON ar.id = arp.role_id AND ar.status = 1 JOIN admin_user_role aur ON aur.role_id = ar.id WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} AND ap.status = 1 ORDER BY ap.code
SELECT region FROM admin_region_scope WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY region
SELECT id, code, name, category, permission_type, status FROM admin_permission WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY category, code
SELECT id, code, name, description, status, built_in FROM admin_role ORDER BY built_in DESC, id
SELECT ar.id, ar.code, ar.name, ar.description, ar.status, ar.built_in FROM admin_role ar JOIN admin_user_role aur ON aur.role_id = ar.id WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY ar.id
SELECT permission_id FROM admin_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY permission_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) FROM admin_user au JOIN admin_user_role aur ON aur.admin_id = au.id JOIN admin_role ar ON ar.id = aur.role_id WHERE au.status = 1 AND ar.status = 1 AND ar.code = 'super_admin'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_role(code, name, description, status, built_in) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{builtIn})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_role SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_role SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, account, password_hash, name, status, last_login_at FROM admin_user ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user(account, password_hash, name, status) VALUES (#{account}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET name = #{name}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log(admin_id, action, target, detail, ip) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{action}, #{target}, #{detail}, #{ip})
